Café Sài Gòn  ·  Philadelphia
We cook the way it's always been done — slowly, carefully, and with a lot of love.
· · ✦ · ·

Every bite is rooted in the kind of cooking passed down through generations — the kind you'd find in a Vietnamese home kitchen on a quiet afternoon.

No shortcuts. No fuss. Just honest, soul-warming food made from recipes that have stood the test of time.

Serving Northeast Philadelphia's finest authentic Vietnamese cuisine — from our legendary bánh mì and rich noodle soup to broken rice plates, bún, congee, and full catering for your special occasions.

— Từ bếp nhà, đến bàn ăn của bạn —

🍞

Best Bánh Mì in Northeast Philly

Fresh-baked baguettes loaded with authentic Vietnamese fillings — grilled pork, cold cuts, chicken & more. A Philadelphia institution.

🍜

Authentic Noodle Soups and Rice Plates

Rich, slow-simmered broth with hand-prepared toppings. Phnom Penh, Bún Bò Huế, Bún Riêu, Broken Rice Plates & more — all made the traditional way.

🎉

Vietnamese Catering in Philadelphia

From intimate gatherings to large celebrations — steamed rice rool, salad, fried rice, spring rolls & traditional Đầy Tháng baby shower packages.

What Guests Are Saying

Loved by Philadelphia

Decades of authentic Vietnamese cooking — here's what our neighbors and visitors say about Café Sài Gòn.

★★★★★

This place has been around for decades and has always been my go-to spot for Vietnamese food. The dishes are authentic and always hit the spot. Honestly, it's the best Vietnamese place in Northeast Philly — and arguably the best in the city.

W
Will
Google Local Guide · Northeast Philadelphia
★★★★★

I drive 25 minutes from Fishtown to go to this place. It is by far the best Vietnamese food I've had in Philly and even Chinatown. It's so affordable and so authentic and fresh. Can't recommend this place enough.

UT
Uncle T
Google Local Guide · Fishtown, Philadelphia
★★★★★

Best bánh mì thịt nướng I've had outside of Vietnam. Ridiculously good value. I've had their noodle, bún, and broken rice platter — it's all delicious, but their bánh mì is killer. I miss this place since moving out of state.

DL
Damien Linh
Google Review · Vietnamese cuisine lover
★★★★★

My favorite spot ever! Haven't found a place as good as this one. Love going on rainy days. My favorite thing to order is #16 with a large coconut water.

RV
Rose V
Google Review · Regular dine-in guest
★★★★★

This is the best mom-and-pop Vietnamese restaurant for such an affordable price. I'm here every Saturday and the food never disappoints. The consistency is so on point and so important to their success.

PT
P. Tran
Google Local Guide · 352 reviews
★★★★★

One of the best places to get Vietnamese food in the city. Their bánh mì special was great, bánh cuốn is highly recommended, and their beef wrapped in grape leaf appetizer is a must-try. This place has been around for so long for good reason.

AC
Amy & Chelsea
Google Local Guides · Philadelphia
Read All Reviews on Google

Catering Menu

From intimate gatherings to large celebrations — let us bring the flavors of Café Sài Gòn to your event. Call (215) 744-4654 or message us on Facebook to order ahead.

* Items marked with * contain peanuts. Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish, eggs or unpasteurized milk may increase your risk of foodborne illness.
